ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "amplicon_name" TEXT /* Name of the amplicon */,
  "guide_name" TEXT /* Name of the guide RNA */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., knock-out) */,
  "guide_location" INTEGER /* Location of the guide RNA on the genome */,
  "is_on_target" INTEGER /* Indicates if the experiment is on target */,
  "dna_feature" TEXT /* Type of DNA feature targeted (e.g., gene) */,
  "chrom" TEXT /* Chromosome where the experiment is conducted */,
  "forward_primer_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the forward primer */,
  "forward_primer_start" INTEGER /* Start position of the forward primer on the genome */,
  "forward_primer_end" INTEGER /* End position of the forward primer on the genome */,
  "reverse_primer_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the reverse primer */,
  "reverse_primer_start" INTEGER /* Start position of the reverse primer on the genome */,
  "reverse_primer_end" INTEGER /* End position of the reverse primer on the genome */,
  "refseq_orientation_match" TEXT /* Indicates if the orientation matches the reference sequence */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the experiment (if applicable) */,
  "description" INTEGER /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the experiment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the protocols table */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the targets table */,
  "primer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the primers table */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the projects table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_primer_id FOREIGN KEY ("primer_id") REFERENCES primers ("primer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the experiments */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object to store user-specific permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the experiment started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the experiment ended */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "data" TEXT /* Raw data from the experiment */,
  "analysis" TEXT /* Analysis of the experiment results */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was last updated */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who reviewed the result */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was reviewed */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the result review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "primers" (
  "primer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each primer */,
  "primer_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the primer */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the primer on the genome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the primer on the genome */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the primer is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the primer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the primer was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the primer */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the primer */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the primer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("primer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_primers_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_primers_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the target is located */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Location of the target on the genome */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature being targeted (e.g., gene, promoter) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the target was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the target was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the target */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the target */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that used the protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the PCR protocol */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the protocol was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the protocol was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the protocol */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the protocol */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protocols_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protocols_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the project was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the project */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
